definition: SPX at 21-22x forward P/E implicitly prices negative correlation (ERP ~4.5-5.0% consistent with bonds-as-hedge). Under persistent positive correlation, required ERP rises 50-100bp, implying fair value of 18-19x — a 10-15% gap. Credit spreads add a third inconsistency.
evidence: IG OAS ~90-110bp implies near-zero recession probability
Equity valuations lagged correlation regime shifts by 18-36 months in every prior transition
Nifty Fifty valuations persisted 4+ years into 1968 positive regime
Pair_0 debate concluded mispricing is real but should not be expected to resolve quickly
Three resolution paths: equities derate, bonds rally confirming equity bet, or inconsistency persists
open_questions: Whether different investor bases with different models can sustain the inconsistency indefinitely
Timing of resolution — base rate suggests 18-36 month lag
